"'''Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 15:01:13'''" was an in-universe [[HoloNet News (Insider)|Holonet News]] issue published in [[Star Wars Insider 73|''Star Wars Insider'' 73]].

{{Magazine-stub|article}}

==Contents==
*''New Mon Calamari Council Promises Reform''
*''Valorum Memorial Unveiled to Tightened Security''

==Media==
===Collected in===
*<!-- 2004-01-13 -->[[Star Wars Insider 73|''Star Wars Insider'' 73]]
